signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Extended in Principle Beyond April 21 Deadline** | YES | HIGH confidence[4]
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Extended in Principle Beyond April 21 Deadline** | YES | HIGH confidence[4]

Mediators confirmed on April 15, 2026, that the US and Iran agreed in principle to extend the two-week ceasefire—initially announced by President Trump on April 7 and set to expire around April 21-22—to allow further indirect talks in Islamabad, driving Polymarket odds to 76% for extension by April 21[4]
